title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for increasing output with Claude Code: LLM knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video frames these techniques as a system for 10x productivity improvement in code generation projects.
